summary: Admin CMS Extended Fields testing completed. Backend model fixes applied to server.py - Brand and Project models were missing extended fields. After fixing, all backend API tests pass (12/12). Frontend admin UI verified for both Brands and Projects edit forms - all new fields present and functional.

fixed_issues.issue: Brand model in server.py missing extended fields (feature_cards, gallery_images, related_solutions, priority, products, seo_title, etc.)
fixed_issues.fix: Added ~10 missing fields to Brand Pydantic model

fixed_issues.issue: Project model in server.py missing extended fields (category, video_url, features, results, images, thumbnail, size, etc.)
fixed_issues.fix: Added ~10 missing fields to Project Pydantic model

edit_form_sections.basic_info: PASS - Brand Name, Slug, Logo, Hero Image, Tagline, Descriptions
edit_form_sections.brand_details: PASS - Website, Country, Year, Categories, Certifications, Key Features, Priority
edit_form_sections.products: PASS - Multiple products with name, price, image, description
edit_form_sections.feature_cards: PASS - Add Card button, Title, Description, Benefits (comma-separated)
edit_form_sections.gallery_images: PASS - Multi-image upload with Upload Images and Add URL buttons

edit_form_sections.basic_info: PASS - Title, Slug, Location, Type, Year

case_study.challenge: PASS - Textarea for describing client challenge
case_study.solution_details: PASS - Textarea for describing LEXA solution

api_endpoints.POST /api/admin/projects: PASS - All extended fields saved including category, video_url, features, results

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py Brand model was missing 10+ fields that exist in models/content.py Brand model
FIXED: server.py Project model was missing 10+ fields including category, video_url, features, results
The models in server.py and models/content.py should be consolidated to avoid this issue in the future
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added missing fields to Brand and Project models
seed_data_creation: Test project created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin CMS extended fields are working. Brands have feature_cards (title/description/benefits array), gallery_images (multi-image), and related_solutions (comma-separated slugs). Projects have category, video_url, features array, results array, and case study fields (challenge, solution_details, outcome). All 36 brands and 20 projects are editable. Backend models in server.py were fixed to include all fields from models/content.py.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The Brand and Project Pydantic models in /app/backend/server.py were out of sync with /app/backend/models/content.py. The server.py models had extra='ignore' which silently dropped any fields not defined in the model.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added all missing fields to the Brand and Project models in server.py to match the complete field set from models/content.py
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 12 API tests pass, including create/update with extended fields
